title: Spanish Galician Croquettes with Iberico Jamon
description: A Spanish-inspired snack featuring crispy croquettes filled with pillowy Iberico jamon.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup roasted galician jamon, finely chopped

instructions: 1. Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg and a pinch of salt.
4. Add the chopped galician jamon, grated cheese, parsley, and chopped iberico jamon to the egg mixture. Mix well.
5. Using a spoon, drop the egg mixture into the flour mixture, coating the croquettes evenly.
6. When the oil is hot, add a few croquettes to the pan (do not overcrowd). Fry for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
7. Using a slotted spoon, remove the croquettes from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
8. Repeat the frying process with the remaining croquettes.
9. Serve the croquettes hot with a side of your favorite dipping sauce.
10. Enjoy your crispy Spanish Galician croquettes!
